cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Factory entrance gatehouse, 18m span and 7m total height, modern style. What budget should I expect?
context_window: project type is factory entrance gatehouse

mustInclude: recognize that the user already shared useful project facts
explain that structure, finish, and installation conditions still affect the range
invite one clear next step for narrowing the budget

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can I see a similar style first? This is for a rural gatehouse and I am leaning new-Chinese.

mustInclude: catch the design intent first
mention that proportion and scene affect which reference is useful
guide toward site photo or reference image

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: These gatehouse cases all look fake. How do I know any of them are real?

mustInclude: de-escalation
practical proof angle
room for the user to keep asking

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We need the scenic spot gatehouse up before the holiday opening. Can you guarantee the schedule?
context_window: project is for a scenic entrance

mustInclude: emotion stabilization
explain schedule depends on drawing, fabrication, transport, and site readiness
ask for date, city, and project facts

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: Can you guarantee local approval and acceptance? I do not want permit trouble.

mustInclude: acknowledge the compliance concern
state that outcomes depend on local rules and project conditions
escalate toward human or specialist review

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: I just want the cheapest village gate possible. Give me the lowest number now.

mustInclude: respect the budget
explain that even the lowest route depends on basic scope
reframe into trade-offs such as image, durability, or speed

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Which is more durable for a gatehouse, stone or steel structure?

mustInclude: context-based comparison
at least two dimensions such as maintenance, timeline, or appearance
request for scene or city

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: The gatehouse cracked less than a year later. Did you cut corners on this job?

mustInclude: empathy first
request for photos and timing through DM
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: too much personal info request in comments

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can you do this project in another province and include transport plus installation?

mustInclude: say feasibility depends on city and site access
mention logistics or installation coordination
guide toward city and site details
mustAvoid: promise full delivery scope without conditions

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your WeChat. I want to talk now.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move faster
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request site photo, rough size, or city as the next action
mustAvoid: just saying DM me with no value

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: This is on the coast. What wind level can your gatehouse handle, and can you guarantee it will be safe?

mustInclude: state that the question is important
mention span, base condition, and local environment
escalate toward engineering review

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Can we wrap the old gatehouse instead of demolishing it? I want to save time.

mustInclude: understand the time-saving goal
say the answer depends on the current structure and base condition
request photos of the existing gatehouse
